zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Rippon Ripley於1574年6月出生在英國英格蘭越可爾斯托可斯利時，他的父親Thomas Henry Rippon Ripley22歲，母親Elizabeth Overman25歲。他於1597年與Lady Elizabeth Margaret Jackson在英國英格蘭波克夏聖 包利斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1634年9月7日在英國英格蘭越可爾包藍德享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏聖 包利斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Rippon Ripley于1574年6月出生在英国英格兰越可爾斯托可斯利时，他的父亲Thomas Henry Rippon Ripley22岁，母亲Elizabeth Overman25岁。他于1597年与Lady Elizabeth Margaret Jackson在英国英格兰波克夏聖 包利斯 邱奇结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1634年9月7日在英国英格兰越可爾包藍德享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波克夏聖 包利斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Ripley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Ripley (Derbyshire, Hampshire, Surrey, Yorkshire). The Hampshire and Surrey placenames derive from Old English ripel, rippel ‘strip of land’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. The Yorkshire placename probably derives from the Anglian tribe name Hrype + Old English lēah. The Derbyshire placename may derive from Old English ripel, rippel or the Anglian tribe name Hrype + Old English lēah.
History: William Ripley (died 1656) came from Wymondham, Norfolk, England, to Hingham, MA, in 1638.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: Rippon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Ripon in Yorkshire. The placename means ‘amongst the Hrype’, from the Anglian tribe name Hrype, dative plural Hrypum, of obscure etymology.

variants.name: Rippeon
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of English   Rippon  .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Rippon Ripley was born in June 1574, in Stokesley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Henry Rippon Ripley, was 22 and his mother, Elizabeth Overman, was 25. He married Lady Elizabeth Margaret Jackson in 1597, in St Paul's Church, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 7 September 1634, in Bowland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in St Paul's Church, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Rippon Ripley est né en juin 1574, à Stokesley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Henry Rippon Ripley, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Overman, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Margaret Jackson en 1597, à St Paul's Church, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 7 septembre 1634, à Bowland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à St Paul's Church, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Rippon Ripley im Juni 1574 in Stokesley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Henry Rippon Ripley 22 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Overman 25. Er hat 1597 in St Paul's Church, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Elizabeth Margaret Jackson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 7. September 1634 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Bowland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Paul's Church, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Rippon Ripley è nato il nel giugno 1574 nel Stokesley, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Henry Rippon Ripley, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Overman, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Margaret Jackson nel 1597, nel St Paul's Church, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Rippon Ripleyが1574年6月にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアストケスリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Henry Rippon Ripleyは22歳，母Elizabeth Overmanは25歳であった。1597年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアスト プアウル'ス チャーチでLady Elizabeth Margaret Jacksonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1634年9月7日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアボウランドで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアスト プアウル'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Rippon Ripley(이)가 1574년 6월 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스토케슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Henry Rippon Ripley(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Overman(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1597년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 스트 폴'스 c후르치에서 Lady Elizabeth Margaret Jackson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1634년 9월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 보우랜드에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 스트 폴'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Rippon Ripley nasceu em junho de 1574, em Stokesley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Henry Rippon Ripley, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Overman, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Margaret Jackson em 1597, em St Paul's Church, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de setembro de 1634, em Bowland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em St Paul's Church, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Paul's Church, Berkshire, England, Un: ст поул'с чурч, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Rippon Ripley родился июнь 1574 г. в местности стокесли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Henry Rippon Ripley было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Overman, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Margaret Jackson в 1597 г. в местности ст поул'с чурч, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 7 сентября 1634 г. в местности боуланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности ст поул'с чурч, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Rippon Ripley nació en junio de 1574, en Stokesley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Henry Rippon Ripley, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Overman, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Margaret Jackson en 1597, en St Paul's Church, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 7 de septiembre de 1634, en Bowland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en St Paul's Church, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
